concerns.text: Knot Atlas, KnotInfo, and OEIS A002863 are marked 'NO verified source found' yet form the core data foundation. Plan must either verify these sources via Reference-Validator or identify alternative verified data resources before implementation.

Contradictory prime knot counts at crossing number 13: research.md cites 9988 (OEIS A002863) while Assumptions section states '49 prime knots'. This fundamental data discrepancy must be resolved before proceeding.

Empirical count '9988 prime knots at crossing number 13' is asserted without source citation in plan.md. Per Constitution Principle IV, all statistics must cite sources rather than asserting measured values.

Algorithm validation against KnotInfo (≥95% match threshold) assumes KnotInfo reference data coverage ≥10%. If KnotInfo is unverified, this validation pathway is unreliable. Need alternative verification strategy.

FR-001 requires downloading from https://katlas.org but research.md confirms Knot Atlas is not in verified sources list. Constitution Principle II requires all external citations verified before contributing review points.
